def negative_instrumentation_import_or_setup_occurs_on_first_live_request():
    rule_id = "instrumentation_import_or_setup_occurs_on_first_live_request"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag observability setup that waits until the first request or task instead of initializing predictably."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
